title: (Bullish Signal) SPLK, entered Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on May 26, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that SPLK's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. A.I.dvisor backtested 81 similar cases where SPLK's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 65 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $121.44 crossed the support line at $115.76 and is trading between $126.81 resistance and $115.76 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/26/21 - 05/26/21, the price experienced a -9% Downtrend, while the week of 05/19/21 - 05/26/21 shows a +8% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/sd65nmfzep171.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=7a1bbb46049c32fbec45c66ed2d1a7357aabe774

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 26, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SPLK as a result. In 65 of 81 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for SPLK just turned positive on May 20, 2021. Looking at past instances where SPLK's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 36 of 45 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +2.95% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SPLK advanced for three days, in 262 of 348 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

SPLK may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
